problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Piezoelectric. Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
